subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto that which the Herald of the All-Merciful proclaimeth from the direction of Paradise, for verily thy hearing of His call is better than aught else [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع ما ینادی به منادی الرحمن عن جهه الرضوان و ان استماعک ندائه خیر عما
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power of the Manifestation of God, @call to action, @living waters; water of life
